calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Paolini for and with Andrew Colvin.

The Court informed the Parties that there might be a slight reduction in the extraordinary fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Continued To Jun-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Status Report
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Paolini for Andrew Colvin (Executor).

Mr. Paolini requested more time stating that he was told by the Executor and the Accountant that they will have a 706 (estate taxes) filed within the next two weeks. The Court granted the status report (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or a further Status Report was set for March 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
